name: Same Assessor Role Across Checkpoints Pipeline
description: Workflow where the same assessor role is required in multiple checkpoints.
outcome: The same assessor role can legally assess different subjects at more than one checkpoint.

definition.process_instructions: The checkpoint reuse assessor evaluates both implementation and release-readiness output at different checkpoints. The system must preserve those as distinct, revision-aware assessment tasks.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish
